name: Mentor MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing AI mentoring and coaching capabilities, from cyanheads — a developer known for producing high-quality MCP servers. Enables AI agents to provide structured feedback, track learning progress, deliver coaching guidance, and support skill development through systematic mentoring interactions.
use_cases: Providing structured learning feedback from AI tutoring agents
Tracking skill development progress from educational coaching agents
Delivering systematic code review feedback from mentor agents
Supporting onboarding workflows with AI-driven mentoring interactions
not_for: High-stakes performance management requiring human oversight
Teams not using AI for learning and development workflows
best_when: A developer or team wants AI agents to provide structured mentoring feedback — tracking learning progress, delivering coaching guidance, and supporting skill development in an AI-assisted learning workflow.
avoid_when: You need human-led mentoring with emotional intelligence and contextual judgment. AI mentoring complements but doesn't replace human mentors for high-stakes development.

auth.notes: Local mentoring tool — no authentication required.

known_agent_gotchas: cyanheads consistently delivers high-quality implementations — expect above-average code quality
Mentoring effectiveness depends on agent's ability to understand learner context
Learning progress state is local — not persisted if MCP server restarts
33 stars is modest but cyanheads quality signal is strong — evaluate the implementation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local mentoring tool. No credentials. Learning interaction data stays local. cyanheads quality implementation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. No credentials. cyanheads quality. Low risk.
